summary: An excellent audience (AUD) recording that captures a strong first set and a thunderous Drums‑>Space, though the second set stumbles a bit on China>Rider.
review: The tape is widely praised as one of the best‑sounding AUD recordings, with crisp detail and surprisingly strong bass for an audience source. Musically the show delivers a very good first set and a standout Drums‑>Space and Wheel sequence, but the China>Rider transition in the second set is noted as a weak spot, leading to mixed feelings about the overall performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Recording quality is consistently described as stellar/excellent (weight 30%). Show quality is mostly positive with a few criticisms (weight 70%), yielding an overall weighted rating around 4.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Repeatedly called the best‑sounding AUD tape, crisp and sweet with strong bass presence for an audience recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is described as very good and tightly performed; second set has a stumble in China>Rider but recovers with a thunderous drums/space and excellent Wheel segment.

band_member_comments.Phil: Praised for great playing throughout the first set.
band_member_comments.Drums: Thunderous drums and a creative, standout space section noted by reviewers.
